---
title: "Contact"
---

## Contact Information

### Laboratory Address

Department of XXXXX

University of XXXXX

Address line

## Email

lab\@email.edu

## Follow Us

-   Google Scholar
-   PubMed
-   LinkedIn

---
title: "Contact"
editor: visual
---

## Get in Touch

- **Office**: 
- **Email**: contact@lab.university.edu
- **Mailing Address**: 123 University Ave, City, State, ZIP

## Directions
Our lab is located on the main campus. The nearest subway station 
---

## Location

<iframe src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?" width="100%" height="400">

</iframe>

##
